scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" build && pnpm --filter @leetgrind/server build && pnpm --filter @leetgrind/web build
scripts.dev: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" build && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @leetgrind/server dev" "pnpm --filter @leetgrind/web dev"
